title: Deloitte South Asia COO dismisses AI job loss fears, pushes for upskilling amid massive India hiring
description: Deloitte South Asia Chief Operating Officer Nitin Kini states Artificial Intelligence will not cause job losses. Instead, the company is focusing on upskilling its workforce to tackle complex business challenges. Deloitte plans to launch a Quantum Centre of Excellence in India. The firm is heavily investing in India, its top priority market.
